name: USS Advent (AM 83)
events: 2 Jul 1945 Around 1645 K/2, USS Lionfish (T/Lt.Cdr. B.M. Ganyard, USN) and USS Kingfish (T/Lt.Cdr. T.D. Keegan, USN) departed Guam for their patrol areas. They were escorted until 2030 K/2 by USS PC-1587 (Lt. D.N. Perrine, USNR).
The submarines parted company with each other around 2200 I/4.
